assignments.name: Convert_the_Mobile_to_International_Format
assignments.label: Convert the Mobile to International Format

assignments.name: Set_Create_New_Temp_User_on_Approval_Screen
assignments.label: Set Create New Temp User on Approval Screen

assignments.name: Set_Site_from_Site_not_listed
assignments.label: Set Site from Site not listed

choices.name: NoUserListCollectionRecord
choices.choiceText: >> I can’t find my name.

decisions.name: Are_we_Validating_a_PIN_Number
decisions.label: Are we Validating a PIN Number?

rules.name: Yes_Standard_TS_Approver_PIN_Required
rules.label: Yes, Standard TS Approver PIN Required

decisions.description: Check if the Signature was saved and a DocumentId Exists. If its NULL set if from the Screen Signature Component.
decisions.name: Check_if_Signature_Stored
decisions.label: Check if Signature Stored

decisions.name: Did_the_user_select_a_Name
decisions.label: Did the user select a Name?

decisions.name: Did_the_user_select_a_site
decisions.label: Did the user select a site?

decisions.name: Do_we_have_an_existing_user
decisions.label: Do we have an existing user

decisions.name: Do_we_need_to_Create_a_new_Temp_TS_Approver_Record
decisions.label: Do we need to Create a new Temp TS Approver Record

decisions.name: If_PIN_required_do_we_have_any_TS_Approvers
decisions.label: If PIN required do we have any TS Approvers

rules.name: Yes_PIN_Required_but_no_Approvers
rules.label: Yes PIN Required but no Approvers

decisions.description: Check if the Standard PIN has expired OR the user clicked they've forgotten their PIN.
decisions.name: PIN_Management
decisions.label: PIN Management

decisions.name: User_has_no_TSA_Record_Sig_Only
decisions.label: User has no TSA Record Sig Only

decisions.description: Check if the Shift can be approved. Fail if too early, too late, Cancelled or already approved..
decisions.name: Validate_if_the_Shift_can_be_approved
decisions.label: Validate if the Shift can be approved.

rules.name: No_TS_Approver_found_on_Account
rules.label: No TS Approver found on Account

decisions.name: Which_User_need_a_PIN_reset
decisions.label: Which User need a PIN reset?

Flow.description: Latest version containing the Offline TS, Signature Only and Signature and PIN Approval Options. LO_ UI Changes

dynamicChoiceSets.description: Get a list of Sites to use in the Site selection Picklist.
dynamicChoiceSets.name: SiteCollectionRecordSet

dynamicChoiceSets.description: This collection is a list of TS Approver linked to the Facility.
dynamicChoiceSets.name: TSApproverCollectionResource

formulas.description: Depending if the TS Approver is Standard or Temp, set the Approver Name which is stored on the Shift.
formulas.name: ApproverFullName

formulas.description: Depending if the TS Approver is Standard or Temp, set the Approver Position which is stored on the Shift.
formulas.name: ApproverPosition
ConvertTempMobiletoInternationalFormat
FlowFormattedErrorMessage
formulas.expression: TRIM( MID( {!$Flow.FaultMessage}, FIND('FIELD_CUSTOM_VALIDATION_EXCEPTION: ', {!$Flow.FaultMessage}) + LEN('FIELD_CUSTOM_VALIDATION_EXCEPTION: '), FIND('. You can look up', {!$Flow.FaultMessage}) - (FIND('FIELD_CUSTOM_VALIDATION_EXCEPTION: ', {!$Flow.FaultMessage}) + LEN('FIELD_CUSTOM_VALIDATION_EXCEPTION: ')) ) )

formulas.description: Checks to see if the date the PIN was generated exceeds the number of days set in the custom metadata.
formulas.name: hasStandardPINExpired
IsSignatureEntryRequiredOld

formulas.description: Used to display either the Site Selected or manually inputted.
formulas.name: SiteSelectedDisplayVAR
SMSBodyRegeneratedTempPIN
formulas.expression: "Alliance Connect - Here is your new temporary PIN. This will expire in 24 hours. " + {!FormattedTempRegeneratedPINNumber}

formulas.name: SMSBodyUpdatedTempPIN
formulas.expression: "Alliance Connect - Here is your new temporary PIN. This will expire in 24 hours. " + {!FormattedTempUpdatedPINNumber}

formulas.name: SMSCreateNewTempBody
formulas.expression: "Alliance Connect - Here is your new temporary PIN. This will expire in 24 hours. " + {!FormattedTempPinNumber}

formulas.description: Check if the Actual Start Time is populated, if not use the Scheduled Start Date
formulas.name: ValidateActualEndTimeisPopulated

formulas.description: Check if the Actual Start Time(Local) is populated, if not use the Scheduled Start Date
formulas.name: ValidateActualEndTimeLocalisPopulated

formulas.description: Check if the Actual Start Time is populated, if not use the Scheduled Start Date
formulas.name: ValidateActualStartTimeisPopulated

formulas.description: Check if the Actual Start Time Local is populated, if not use the Scheduled Start Date
formulas.name: ValidateActualStartTimeLocalisPopulated

Flow.interviewLabel: 1218 Alliance Connect Shift Approval Manager V3 {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: 1218 Alliance Connect Shift Approval Manager V3

recordLookups.description: Get all Active Timesheet Approvers, Standard and Temporary linked to the Shift > Contract Facility.
recordLookups.name: Get_All_Timesheet_Approvers
recordLookups.label: Get All Timesheet Approvers

recordLookups.description: Get any Claimed allowances (Custom Rule) related to the Shift.
recordLookups.name: Get_Claimed_Allowances
recordLookups.label: Get Claimed Allowances

recordLookups.name: Get_Full_Initial_TS_Approver_based_on_PIN
recordLookups.label: Get Full Initial TS Approver based on PIN

recordLookups.description: This is used as the default when selecting the TS Approver.
recordLookups.name: Get_Last_Used_TS_Approver
recordLookups.label: Get Last Used TS Approver

recordLookups.name: Get_Shift_PIN_Custom_Meta_Config
recordLookups.label: Get Shift PIN Custom Meta Config

recordLookups.description: Gets the Shift the users where reviewing in the Alliance Connect App.
recordLookups.name: Get_Shift_Record
recordLookups.label: Get Shift Record

recordLookups.name: Get_Temp_Approver_Record_Type_ID
recordLookups.label: Get Temp Approver Record Type ID

recordLookups.name: Get_TS_Approver_Full_record_based_on_Selection
recordLookups.label: Get TS Approver Full record based on Selection

recordLookups.name: Get_TS_Approver_Full_record_Signature_Only
recordLookups.label: Get TS Approver Full record Signature Only

recordLookups.name: Get_TS_Approver_Temp_Record_Type
recordLookups.label: Get TS Approver Temp Record Type

recordUpdates.name: Update_Regen_Temp_TS_Approver_PIN
recordUpdates.label: Update Regen Temp TS Approver PIN

recordUpdates.description: This is used to store the default Client Contact to show when selecting an Approver.
recordUpdates.name: Update_TS_Approver_Last_Approved_Date
recordUpdates.label: Update TS Approver Last Approved Date

screens.description: The candidate has already approved the offline timesheet.
screens.name: Candidate_already_approved
screens.label: Candidate already approved

fields.name: Header6
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: DisplayText_7
fields.fieldText:
This shift has already been submitted for review and no changes can be made.


If changes are required, please contact your local branch.


Press the back arrow on the top left corner to return to the shift view.

screens.name: Candidate_Cannot_Use_Own_Mobile_Screen
screens.label: Candidate Cannot Use Own Mobile Screen

fields.name: ScreenHeader15
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager (Approver)

fields.name: CannotUseOwnNumberScreenText
fields.fieldText:
You cannot use the same mobile number as the candidate allocated to this shift.


Please enter the mobile number of the approver.

fields.name: CandidateReviewHeader
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager (Candidate)

fields.name: Offline_Timesheet_Instruction
fields.fieldText:
This facility does not allow electronic timesheet approval.


Please review your shift details below and continue to submit for approval.

fields.name: CandidateReviewText1
fields.fieldText: Please review the shift details ({!Get_Shift_Record.Name}) and confirm that you worked this shift.

value.stringValue: Did you take the 2nd meal break?

fields.name: Candidate_Review_Site_worked_Lookup
fields.fieldText: Site worked

fields.name: CandidateReviewGenSiteError
fields.fieldText:
This is a generic site and cannot be used to approve a shift.

Please select the actual site you worked. If you cannot find it, tick the checkbox below.

fields.name: CandidateReview_SiteNotFound
fields.fieldText: Site not found in the list

fields.name: CandidateReviewSiteName
fields.fieldText: Enter the site name

fields.name: CandidateReviewCalimedAllTitle
fields.fieldText: Claimed Allowances.

fields.name: ApprovalMethodCandidateReviewScreen
fields.fieldText:
By clicking Continue, you confirm that all details shown are accurate.

Fraudulent behaviour may lead to legal consequences.

screens.description: TS Approver selection screen. They need to confirm they are the person or we branch.
screens.name: Create_Temporary_PIN_Screen
screens.label: Create Temporary PIN Screen

fields.name: ScreenHeader12
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager (Approver)

fields.name: CreateTempApproverText1
fields.fieldText:
This facility requires PIN approval, but no PIN is registered in our system.


Please provide your name, position, and mobile number so we can generate a temporary PIN.


This temporary PIN will be valid for 24 hours.

fields.name: CreateTempPINApproverName
fields.fieldText: Please enter your name

fields.name: CreateTempPINApproverPosition
fields.fieldText: Please enter your position

fields.name: CreateTempPINApproverMobile
fields.fieldText: Please enter your mobile number

fields.name: CreateTempApproverText2
fields.fieldText: The mobile number is invalid. Please try again. e.g +61412345678 or 0412345678.

screens.description: Display PIN or Signature Components depending on Approval Method from Approver Record.
screens.name: Initial_PIN_Entry_Screen
screens.label: Initial PIN Entry Screen

fields.name: InitialScreenHeader5
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager (Approver)

fields.name: InitialPINText1
fields.fieldText: PIN Verification

fields.name: InitialPINText2
fields.fieldText: To approve this shift ({!Get_Shift_Record.Name}), we need to verify your PIN first.

fields.name: InitialPINNumberEntry
fields.fieldText: Enter your 4-digit PIN here:

fields.name: InitialPINText3
fields.fieldText: The PIN you entered is invalid or has expired. Please try again, or use ‘Forgot PIN’ to get a new one.

fields.name: InitialRe_generate_PIN_Number
fields.fieldText: I've forgotten my PIN & want to reset it.

fields.name: PIN_Reset_Instruction
fields.fieldText: Please press Continue.

fields.name: Disclaimer
fields.fieldText: Fraudulent behaviour may lead to legal consequences.

fields.name: ScreenHeader16
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: SMSSentText
fields.fieldText:
A new temporary PIN has been sent to {!CreateTempPINApproverMobile_VAR}.

This temporary PIN is valid for 24 hours.


Once you receive it, press Continue to enter your PIN.


If there’s a delay receiving your PIN, wait for the PIN and then restart the Shift Approval Manager.

screens.description: The Shift has no TS Approver found on the Account.
screens.name: No_TS_Approval_Method_Found
screens.label: No TS Approval Method Found

fields.name: Header5
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: Copy_2_of_DisplayText_ShirtPassed4Weeks
fields.fieldText:
This shift cannot be approved because no approval method has been set for this facility.


Please contact your local branch for assistance.


Press the back arrow on the top left corner to return to the shift view.

fields.name: CandidateApprovedHeader
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager (Candidate)

fields.name: CandidateApprovedText
fields.fieldText:
The shift has been submitted for approval.


We will review it against the facility’s records and approve it accordingly.


Press the back arrow on the top left corner to return to the shift view.

fields.name: RegenHeader1
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager (Approver)

fields.name: EmailSentTextRegeneratePIN
fields.fieldText:
We’ve emailed a new PIN to {!Get_TS_Approver_Full_record_based_on_Selection.Contact__r.Email}.

When it arrives, press Continue to enter your PIN.


If it’s delayed, wait for the email and restart the Shift Approval Manager.

fields.name: RegenHeader2
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager (Approver)

fields.name: EmailSentTextRegenerateSelectionPIN
fields.fieldText:
A new temporary PIN has been sent to {!Get_TS_Approver_Full_record_based_on_Selection.Temp_Approver_Mobile__c}.

This temporary PIN is valid for 24 hours. Once you receive it, press Continue to enter your PIN.


If there’s a delay receiving your PIN, wait for the PIN and then restart the Shift Approval Manager.

fields.name: ScreenHeader2
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager (Approver)

fields.name: SigOnlyNoTSApproverRecord
fields.fieldText:
Temporary approver detail


Please complete the fields below.


This information is collected to identify who is approving the shift and is used for invoicing and auditing purposes only.

fields.name: TempApprover_Full_Name
fields.fieldText: Approver Full Name

fields.name: TempApprover_Position
fields.fieldText: Approver Position

fields.name: ShiftInfoText
fields.fieldText: You are about to approve {!Get_Shift_Record.Name} for {!Get_Shift_Record.sirenum__Contact__r.FirstName} {!Get_Shift_Record.sirenum__Contact__r.LastName}.

fields.name: ReviewSite
fields.fieldText: Site: {!Get_Site_from_Candidate_Selection.Name}

fields.name: ReviewSiteUnknown
fields.fieldText:
Site (unregistered): {!CandidateReviewSiteName}

(We will review and update our system.)

fields.name: ReviewActualTimes
fields.fieldText:
Actual Start Time: {!Get_Shift_Record.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}

Actual End Time: {!Get_Shift_Record.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}

fields.name: ActualStartTimeChanged
fields.fieldText: The actual start time and/or end time has been changed. Please review before approving the shift.

fields.name: ShiftInfoBreak1
fields.fieldText:
1st meal break start time: {!Get_Shift_Record.sirenum__BreakStartTime__c}

1st meal break length: {!Get_Shift_Record.sirenum__Break_Length__c} minutes

fields.name: MeakBreakStartTimeChanged
fields.fieldText: The 1st meal break start time and/or length has been changed. Please review it before approving this shift.

fields.name: ShiftInfoBreak2Txt
fields.fieldText:
2nd meal break start time: {!Get_Shift_Record.tc9_ext_sirint__Second_Break_Start_Time__c}

2nd meal break length: {!Get_Shift_Record.tc9_ext_sirint__Second_Break_Length__c} minutes

fields.name: MeakBreakEndTimeChanged
fields.fieldText: The 2nd meal break start time and/or length has been changed. Please review it before approving this shift.

fields.name: ShiftInfoClaimedTitle
fields.fieldText: Claimed Allowances

fields.name: ClaimedAllowancesCheck
fields.fieldText: I approve these allowances.

validationRule.errorMessage: This is a required field.

fields.name: SIGText10
fields.fieldText: A signature is required to confirm your approval for this shift. Please sign below and press Upload and Save.

fields.name: SigRequiredTxt
fields.fieldText: A signature is required to confirm your approval for this shift.

fields.name: SigCaptured1
fields.fieldText: Your signature has been successfully uploaded, please press Approve to complete the process.

fields.name: ScreenHeader7
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: ShiftApprovalScreenTxt
fields.fieldText:
The shift has now been approved.


Press the back arrow on the top left corner to return to the shift view.

screens.description: Error screen if the shift has already been approved.
screens.name: Shift_Approved_error_screen
screens.label: Shift Approved error screen

fields.name: Header2
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: DisplayText_ShiftApprovedError
fields.fieldText:
This shift is already approved.


If this seems incorrect, please contact your local branch.


Press the back arrow on the top left corner to return to the shift view.

screens.description: The Shift has been cancelled and cannot be approved.
screens.name: Shift_Cancelled_Error_Screen
screens.label: Shift Cancelled Error Screen

fields.name: Header3
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: DisplayText_ShiftCancelledError
fields.fieldText:
This shift is cancelled and cannot be approved.


If this seems incorrect, please contact your local branch.


Press the back arrow on the top left corner to return to the shift view.

screens.description: The Shift is mote than 15 minutes before the Start Time and cannot be approved.
screens.name: Shift_Too_Early_Error_Screen
screens.label: Shift Too Early Error Screen

fields.name: Header1
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: DisplayText_ShiftToEarlyforApproval
fields.fieldText:
Shifts can only be approved within 15 minutes of the start time.


Try again later or reach out to your local branch for assistance.


Press the back arrow on the top left corner to return to the shift view.

screens.description: The Shift Date is great than 28 days and cannot be approved.
screens.name: Shift_Too_Late_Error_Screen
screens.label: Shift Too Late Error Screen

fields.name: Header4
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: DisplayText_ShirtPassed4Weeks
fields.fieldText:
Shifts older than 4 weeks cannot be approved.


Please contact your local branch for assistance.


Press the back arrow on the top left corner to return to the shift view.

fields.name: ErrorHeader
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: ShiftSaveErrorTxt
fields.fieldText:
There was an error while attempting to approve this shift.


The approval failed for the following reason:


{!FlowFormattedErrorMessage}


Please take a screenshot of this page and contact your local branch for assistance.

fields.name: TSApproverSelected
fields.fieldText: Your PIN Has expired so a new PIN will be generated and emailed to you.

screens.description: TS Approver selection screen. They need to confirm they are the person or we branch.
screens.name: TS_Approver_Selection_Forgotten_PIN
screens.label: TS Approver Selection Forgotten PIN

fields.name: ScreenHeader1
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager (Approver)

fields.name: TSCollectionEmptyHasData
fields.fieldText:
Select your name from the list below, check the confirmation box, and press Continue.


If you can’t find your name, choose the ‘I can’t find my name’ option, check the confirmation box, and then press Continue.

fields.name: TS_Approval_Selection
fields.fieldText: Select your name here:

fields.name: TSApproverCheckboxConfirmation
fields.fieldText: I confirm I am the person selected above.

screens.description: TS Approver selection screen. They need to confirm they are the person or we branch.
screens.name: TS_Approver_Selection_Sig_Only
screens.label: TS Approver Selection Sig Only

fields.name: ScreenHeaderSigOnly
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager (Approver)

fields.name: TSCollectionEmptyHasDataSigOnly
fields.fieldText:
Approver's signature is required to approve this shift. Please select your name from the list below.


If your name is not listed, choose "I can't find my name".

fields.name: TS_Approval_SelectionSigOnly
fields.fieldText: Select your name from the list below:

fields.name: I_confirm_I_am_the_person_selected_above
fields.fieldText: I confirm I am the person selected above.

fields.name: UpdateTempScreenHeader
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager (Approver)

fields.name: SMSSentUpdatePIN
fields.fieldText:
A new temporary PIN has been sent to {!Get_Temp_PIN_User.Temp_Approver_Mobile__c}.

This temporary PIN is valid for 24 hours.


Once you receive it, press Continue to enter your PIN.


If there’s a delay receiving your PIN, wait for the PIN and then restart the Shift Approval Manager.

variables.description: This is used to check and manipulate the phone number.
variables.name: CreateTempPINApproverMobile_VAR

variables.description: Used to store the Id of the Signature Image Document Id
variables.name: SignatureCaptureContentDocumentId
